# anthropic_organization (Data Source)

Fetches the organization associated with the configured admin API key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_organization" "current" {}

output "org_id" {
  value = data.anthropic_organization.current.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)
